notes: Section 102, , , related to conveyance of conversion and production cost information to the President and Congress. See .act Sept. 21, 1922, ch. 356, title III, § 318(a)42 Stat. 948section 1332(d) of this title

Section 104, , , defined the terms “article” and “import costs”. See .act Sept. 21, 1922, ch. 356, title III, § 318(b)42 Stat. 947section 1332(e) of this title
